status_definitions.retrodiction: Matches existing design choice, not a prediction of nature

predictions.name: Egyptian Fraction Attention (EFA) Quality
predictions.claim: Splitting sigma=12 heads as 6(full)+4(local)+2(global) achieves >=98% of full attention quality with ~40% fewer attention FLOPs at seq_len=2048
predictions.falsification_criteria: EFA drops >2% on GLUE average

predictions.name: LoRA Rank r=8 Pareto Optimality
predictions.claim: r=sigma-tau=8 achieves the highest accuracy per trainable parameter on fine-tuning tasks
predictions.falsification_criteria: r=16 beats r=8 in accuracy/param on >=3/5 tasks

predictions.name: MoE (8,2) vs Alternatives
predictions.claim: At fixed total params (~1B), MoE with sigma-tau=8 experts and top-phi=2 beats (4,2), (16,2), (8,1), (8,4)
predictions.falsification_criteria: (16,2) achieves lower perplexity than (8,2)

predictions.name: Mertens Dropout p=ln(4/3)=0.288
predictions.claim: p=0.288 matches or beats p=0.3 on fine-tuning tasks with small datasets (<10K samples)
predictions.falsification_criteria: p=0.3 beats p=0.288 by >0.5% on >=3/5 tasks

predictions.name: SwiGLU Ratio 8/3 Pareto Optimality
predictions.claim: FFN ratio (sigma-tau)/(n/phi)=8/3=2.667 is Pareto-optimal among {2.0, 2.5, 8/3, 3.0, 3.5, 4.0} at fixed compute
predictions.falsification_criteria: Ratio 3.0 or 2.5 achieves lower loss

predictions.name: Weight Decay 0.1 = 1/(sigma-phi) Universality
predictions.claim: WD=0.1 is optimal across model sizes (100M to 10B) and datasets
predictions.falsification_criteria: WD=0.05 beats WD=0.1 at >2 model sizes

predictions.name: sigma=12 Head Count Optimality
predictions.claim: At d_model=768, n_heads=12 achieves the best loss-per-FLOP
predictions.falsification_criteria: 16 heads beats 12 heads per-FLOP

predictions.name: RoPE theta = (sigma-phi)^tau = 10000 Optimality
predictions.claim: theta=10000 is locally optimal for context lengths up to 4096
predictions.falsification_criteria: theta=8000 or theta=15000 beats 10000 at seq_len<=4096

predictions.name: Shockley-Queisser Bandgap = tau/(n/phi) = 4/3 eV
predictions.claim: Solar cells with bandgap exactly 1.333 eV achieve the absolute highest single-junction efficiency
predictions.falsification_criteria: Peak efficiency at 1.34 eV rather than 1.333 eV

predictions.name: JUNO sin^2(theta_12) = 3/10 = 0.3000
predictions.claim: sin^2(theta_12) = (n/phi)/(sigma-phi) = 3/10 = 0.3000 exactly
predictions.falsification_criteria: JUNO measures sin^2(theta_12) > 0.303 or < 0.297 at 3 sigma

predictions.name: LiteBIRD Inflation r = 12/3136 = 0.00383
predictions.claim: Tensor-to-scalar ratio r = sigma/sigma(P_2)^2 = 12/3136 = 0.00383

predictions.name: Next-Gen GPU SM Count Multiple of sigma=12
predictions.claim: NVIDIA's next full-die SM count after 192 (Blackwell) will be a multiple of sigma=12. Possible values: 216, 240, 256, 288
predictions.falsification_criteria: Next gen uses an SM count that does NOT factor through 12

predictions.name: HBM5 Stack Height = 2^tau = 16
predictions.claim: HBM5 (~2026) will standardize at 16-hi stacking, completing ladder tau->sigma-tau->sigma->2^tau
predictions.falsification_criteria: HBM5 standardizes at 20 or 24 layers instead

predictions.name: n=6 Architecture Outperforms Non-Aligned
predictions.claim: Architecture with ALL n=6 dimensions (d=12*1024, heads=12*4, kv=8, d_ff=28*1024, layers=8*11) achieves better loss-per-FLOP than non-n=6
predictions.falsification_criteria: Non-n=6 architecture achieves lower loss

predictions.name: Inference Top-p = 0.95 = 1-1/(J2-tau) Optimality
predictions.claim: top-p=0.95 beats top-p in {0.9, 0.92, 0.97, 0.99} on factual QA benchmarks
predictions.falsification_criteria: top-p=0.9 or 0.99 beats 0.95 on >=3/5 benchmarks

predictions.name: NVIDIA Rubin SM Count in {240, 256, 288}
predictions.claim: NVIDIA's post-Blackwell GPU (Rubin, ~2026) will have SM count = sigma*(J2-tau)=240, 2^(sigma-tau)=256, or sigma*J2=288
predictions.falsification_criteria: Rubin SM count not in {240, 256, 288} and not a multiple of sigma=12

predictions.name: HBM5 Stack = J2 = 24 Dies
predictions.claim: HBM5 (~2027-2028) standardizes at 24-hi stacking
predictions.falsification_criteria: HBM5 standardizes at 20 or 32 layers

predictions.name: PPO Clip epsilon = ln(4/3) = 0.288 vs 0.2
predictions.claim: PPO with epsilon=0.288 matches or exceeds epsilon=0.2 on RLHF tasks
predictions.falsification_criteria: epsilon=0.2 beats epsilon=0.288 by >1% on reward score

predictions.name: Bitcoin 21M = J2 - n/phi Structural Test
predictions.claim: A cryptocurrency with max supply from n=6 arithmetic (e.g., 24M=J2) achieves better tokenomic stability than arbitrary supply caps
predictions.falsification_criteria: Arbitrary supply (e.g., 23M, 25M) performs equally well

predictions.name: 12-Semitone Practical Optimality
predictions.claim: 12-TET (=sigma) is the smallest N that achieves <1% max deviation from all 8 just intonation intervals simultaneously
predictions.falsification_criteria: Already partially falsified -- 19-TET and 22-TET are more accurate. But 12 is #1 for N<=12 (efficiency optimum)

predictions.name: AdamW beta2 = 0.95 Optimality over 0.999
predictions.claim: For LLMs >=1B params, AdamW with beta2=0.95=1-1/(J2-tau) achieves lower final loss than beta2=0.999 within same compute budget
predictions.falsification_criteria: beta2=0.999 or beta2=0.99 beats beta2=0.95 on >=2/3 seeds

predictions.name: beta1 = weight_decay Conjugacy
predictions.claim: Perturbing beta1=0.9 and wd=0.1 independently produces worse results than the conjugate pair (beta1=0.9, wd=0.1)
predictions.falsification_criteria: Off-diagonal pairs (beta1=0.9, wd=0.05) match or beat the diagonal

predictions.name: Rubin Ultra HBM = phi*sigma*J2 = 576GB per Module
predictions.claim: NVIDIA Rubin Ultra (2027) will use 576GB HBM4 per module (or 384GB per GPU)
predictions.falsification_criteria: Rubin Ultra per-GPU HBM not in {384, 576} and not expressible as n=6 arithmetic

predictions.name: n=6 Canonical 7B Outperforms Non-Aligned
predictions.claim: Transformer with n=6 canonical architecture (d=4096=2^sigma, L=32, h=32, d_head=128) achieves lower loss-per-FLOP than non-n=6 dimensions
predictions.falsification_criteria: Non-n=6 config achieves equal or lower loss per FLOP

predictions.name: Layer Count = HBM Capacity Cross-Domain Resonance
predictions.claim: Next canonical ~200B model will use L=sigma*(sigma-tau)=96 layers, matching Gaudi 2 96GB
predictions.falsification_criteria: Next major 200B-class model uses L not in {96, 80, 128}

predictions.name: LoRA r=8 Optimality for 7B Fine-tuning
predictions.claim: LoRA r=8=sigma-tau achieves best loss/parameter-efficiency for 7B model fine-tuning
predictions.falsification_criteria: r=4 or r=16 Pareto-dominates r=8

predictions.name: Next EV Platform Cell Count in n=6 Set
predictions.claim: Next major EV platform (2027+) will use cell count in series expressible as n=6 arithmetic: likely 96S or 192S
predictions.falsification_criteria: Next 3 major EV platforms all use cell counts not expressible as n=6

predictions.name: Diffusion Model Step Counts Follow n=6
predictions.claim: Future diffusion schedulers converge on step counts in {20, 25, 50, 100, 200} -- all n=6 expressions
predictions.falsification_criteria: >=3 major models use non-n=6 step counts as optimal

predictions.name: Next SSM Architecture Uses n=6 State Dimension
predictions.claim: Next major SSM (post-Mamba-2) will use state dimensions from {16, 64, 128, 256}
predictions.falsification_criteria: Next SSM uses d_state not in {16, 64, 128, 256}

predictions.name: 1/(sigma-phi)=0.1 in Future Algorithms
predictions.claim: Next major ML regularization algorithm (2026+) will independently discover 0.1 as its optimal damping/penalty coefficient
predictions.falsification_criteria: Next 3 major algorithms all use values != 0.1 as their default

predictions.name: NVIDIA Rubin SM = sigma*J2=288 or 2^(sigma-tau)=256
predictions.claim: NVIDIA Rubin GPU (2026-2027) will have SM count in {256, 288}
predictions.falsification_criteria: Rubin SM count not in {240, 256, 288} and not a multiple of sigma=12

predictions.name: Diffusion Guidance Scale Near sigma-sopfr=7
predictions.claim: Optimal guidance scales will remain near 7 +/- 0.5 = [6.5, 7.5]
predictions.falsification_criteria: Optimal guidance consistently at values far from 7.5 (e.g., 3.0 or 15.0)

predictions.name: ViT n=6-Aligned Patch/Head Count Wins Fine-Tuning
predictions.claim: ViT-B/16 (n=6-aligned: 12 heads, d=768, patch=16) outperforms ViT-B/14 (misaligned) in accuracy/FLOP on ImageNet-1K
predictions.falsification_criteria: ViT-B/14 beats ViT-B/16 in accuracy/FLOP on >=2/3 seeds

predictions.name: SimCLR Temperature tau_CL = 0.1 = 1/(sigma-phi) Optimality
predictions.claim: SimCLR with temperature=0.1 outperforms temperature=0.07 on ImageNet linear probe for batch sizes <= 2048
predictions.falsification_criteria: temp=0.07 beats temp=0.1 by >0.5% on >=2/3 batch sizes

predictions.name: MoE 1/2^k Activation Fraction from n=6
predictions.claim: MoE with activation fraction = 1/2^k where k from n=6 (1/8 Mixtral-style, 1/16 DeepSeek-style) outperform arbitrary fractions
predictions.falsification_criteria: 1/6 or 1/10 achieves lower perplexity than both 1/8 and 1/16

predictions.name: Flux.1 MM-DiT 19+38 Block Split Optimality
predictions.claim: MM-DiT block split 19+38=57 (19=J2-sopfr) is Pareto-optimal for text-to-image quality vs compute
predictions.falsification_criteria: 24+48 or 16+32 achieves better FID at same FLOPs

predictions.name: Whisper Mel Bins = phi^tau*sopfr = 80 Optimality
predictions.claim: Whisper mel_bins=80 is locally optimal for ASR among mel in {40, 64, 80, 128, 160}
predictions.falsification_criteria: mel=128 achieves lower WER than mel=80 at same compute

predictions.name: Next HVDC Standard Voltage = sigma*(sigma-phi)^2 = 1200 kV
predictions.claim: Next HVDC transmission voltage standard after +/-1100 kV will be +/-1200 kV
predictions.falsification_criteria: Next standard is +/-1500 kV or other value not in {1200, 1300}

predictions.name: NVIDIA Rubin R100 = sigma=12 HBM4 Stacks
predictions.claim: NVIDIA Rubin R100 GPU will use exactly sigma=12 HBM4 stacks
predictions.falsification_criteria: R100 uses 8 or 16 HBM4 stacks instead of 12

predictions.name: Next Major MoE = 256 or 512 Experts
predictions.claim: Next generation MoE LLM (post-DeepSeek-V3) will use 256=2^(sigma-tau) or 512=2^n total experts
predictions.falsification_criteria: Next major MoE uses expert count not in {128, 256, 512} and not a power of 2

predictions.name: Apple M5 Ultra GPU Cores in {96, 128}
predictions.claim: Apple M5 Ultra will have sigma*(sigma-tau)=96 or 2^(sigma-sopfr)=128 GPU cores
predictions.falsification_criteria: M5 Ultra GPU cores not in {96, 128} and not expressible as n=6 arithmetic

predictions.name: TPU v7 Chip Count per Pod = sigma*J2=288 or J2^2=576
predictions.claim: Google TPU v7 will scale to pod sizes 288 or 576 chips
predictions.falsification_criteria: TPU v7 pod size not expressible as n=6 arithmetic

predictions.name: Chiplet Die Count Converges to n=6 Vocabulary
predictions.claim: Next-gen AMD EPYC will use sigma=12 or 2^tau=16 CCD chiplets
predictions.falsification_criteria: Next AMD EPYC uses 10 or 14 CCDs (not in n=6 set)

predictions.name: MI350X Compute Die = n/phi=3 or tau=4
predictions.claim: AMD MI350X will use 3 or 4 compute chiplets per package, with HBM stacks = sigma-tau=8
predictions.falsification_criteria: MI350X uses 5+ compute dies or HBM stacks != 8

predictions.name: B300 NVLink Domain Size = sigma*J2=288 GPUs
predictions.claim: NVIDIA B300 NVLink domain will be 72=sigma*n or 288=sigma*J2 GPUs
predictions.falsification_criteria: B300 NVLink domain not in {72, 144, 288} and not a multiple of sigma=12

predictions.name: DPO Beta = 1/(sigma-phi) = 0.1 Pareto Optimality
predictions.claim: DPO with beta=0.1 achieves best reward model score across preference datasets
predictions.falsification_criteria: beta=0.05 or beta=0.2 beats beta=0.1 by >1% on >=2/3 seeds

predictions.name: PPO Clip epsilon=0.2 = phi/(sigma-phi) Structural
predictions.claim: PPO clip epsilon=0.2 outperforms epsilon in {0.1, 0.15, 0.25, 0.3} on RLHF tasks
predictions.falsification_criteria: epsilon=0.3 achieves higher average reward than epsilon=0.2

predictions.name: GRPO Group Size G=16=phi^tau Optimality
predictions.claim: GRPO with G=16 completions achieves better reward variance reduction per compute than G in {4, 8, 32, 64}
predictions.falsification_criteria: G=8 or G=32 Pareto-dominates G=16 in accuracy/FLOP

predictions.name: Learning Rate 3e-4 = (n/phi)*10^(-tau) Universal Default
predictions.claim: For 1B-scale models, LR=3e-4 achieves lower final loss than LR in {1e-4, 2e-4, 5e-4, 1e-3} across 3+ datasets
predictions.falsification_criteria: LR=5e-4 or LR=1e-4 beats 3e-4 on >=2/3 datasets

predictions.name: Schedule-Free LR Scaling = sigma-phi=10x Boundary
predictions.claim: Schedule-free AdamW achieves optimal performance with LR between 1x and 10x of cosine baseline. Beyond 10x, training diverges.
predictions.falsification_criteria: Optimal multiplier consistently >12 or training stable at 20x

predictions.name: D-T Neutron Energy Fraction = tau/(tau+mu) = 80%
predictions.claim: D-T fusion neutron carries 14.06 MeV / 17.59 MeV = 79.9%, matching tau/(tau+mu) = 4/5 = 80% to 0.1%
predictions.cost_estimate: Precision neutron spectrometry (NIF, ITER test blanket)
predictions.falsification_criteria: Neutron energy fraction deviates from 80% by >0.5% (retrodiction from nuclear data)

predictions.name: Aneutronic p-B11 Produces n/phi=3 Alpha Particles
predictions.claim: p + B-11 -> 3 alpha particles, where alpha count = n/phi=3 is forced by baryon conservation (12/4=3)
predictions.cost_estimate: Alpha particle spectrometry in p-B11 experiments
predictions.falsification_criteria: Competing channels (e.g., p+B11 -> C12+gamma) dominate over 3-alpha

predictions.name: YBCO Optimal CuO2 Layer Count = n/phi=3
predictions.claim: Across ALL cuprate HTS families, max Tc occurs at exactly n/phi=3 CuO2 layers per unit cell
predictions.cost_estimate: Compare Tc for n=1..5 CuO2-layer variants
predictions.falsification_criteria: Any cuprate family achieves higher Tc at CuO2 layers = 4 or 5 than at 3

predictions.name: Nb3Sn A15 Unit Cell = n=6 Nb + phi=2 Sn = sigma-tau=8 Atoms
predictions.claim: A15 crystal structure universally encodes {n, phi, sigma-tau} = {6, 2, 8} for all A15 superconductors
predictions.falsification_criteria: Any stable A15 superconductor has atoms/cell != 8

predictions.name: MgB2 Honeycomb = n=6 Hexagonal
predictions.claim: MgB2 superconductivity requires the n=6 hexagonal boron network. Disrupting hexagonal symmetry destroys superconductivity faster than non-hexagonal disruptions.
predictions.cost_estimate: Systematic doping study, measure Tc suppression rates
predictions.falsification_criteria: B-site substitution with Z=7 preserves Tc better than maintaining hexagonal order

predictions.name: Fusion Ignition Temperature = sigma+phi=14 keV
predictions.claim: D-T cross-section peaks at ion temperature ~14 keV = (sigma+phi) keV
predictions.falsification_criteria: Peak cross-section at T > 16 keV or T < 12 keV

predictions.name: Stellarator Field Periods Follow n=6 Vocabulary
predictions.claim: Optimal stellarator field periods are in {tau=4, sopfr=5, sigma-phi=10}: W7-X=5, LHD=10, HSX=4, TJ-II=4
predictions.falsification_criteria: Next major stellarator uses field period 7 or 9 (not in n=6 set)

predictions.name: PUE Convergence to sigma/(sigma-mu) = 12/11 = 1.091
predictions.claim: Hyperscaler PUE values will converge to 12/11 = 1.091 by 2028
predictions.falsification_criteria: PUE plateaus above 1.12 for all hyperscalers through 2030

predictions.name: Next AI Rack Power Density = sigma^2=144 kW
predictions.claim: After sigma*tau=48 kW era (DGX H100), next tier for GB300/Rubin racks will be sigma^2=144 kW
predictions.falsification_criteria: Next-gen AI racks standardize at power density not in {100, 120, 144} kW range

predictions.name: Thermal Materials at n=6 Multiples of Cu=400 W/mK
predictions.claim: Emerging thermal interface materials will cluster at ~800, ~1200, ~2400 W/mK (n=6 multiples of 400)
predictions.cost_estimate: Literature survey + measurements of new TIM materials
predictions.falsification_criteria: Dominant new materials cluster at non-n=6 multiples (e.g., ~500, ~1500)

predictions.name: Chip Thermal Throttle Margin = sopfr=5 Degrees
predictions.claim: Throttle onset will remain exactly sopfr=5 degrees below Tjmax across future nodes
predictions.falsification_criteria: Next 3 major chip releases use a margin != 5C

predictions.name: Speculative Decoding Draft Length = tau=4 Tokens
predictions.claim: Optimal draft token count k=tau=4 minimizes end-to-end latency across model sizes
predictions.falsification_criteria: k=6 or k=8 achieves higher tokens/second than k=4 on >=2/3 model sizes

predictions.name: Medusa Head Count Optimum at sopfr=5
predictions.claim: Medusa-style parallel decoding with sopfr=5 heads achieves best accuracy-latency tradeoff
predictions.falsification_criteria: 4 or 6 heads Pareto-dominates 5 heads in speedup vs quality

predictions.name: MoD+MoE Combined Compute Floor = 1/(sigma-tau) = 12.5%
predictions.claim: No MoD+MoE combination can reduce inference compute below 1/(sigma-tau)=12.5% of dense equivalent without quality degradation
predictions.falsification_criteria: Quality retained (<2% MMLU drop) at <10% dense-equivalent compute

predictions.name: DeepSeek-V3 KV LoRA Rank 512 = 2^(sigma-n/phi)
predictions.claim: For MLA-style KV compression, kv_lora_rank=512 is Pareto-optimal among {128, 256, 512, 1024, 2048}
predictions.falsification_criteria: rank=256 or rank=1024 achieves better quality per byte of KV cache

predictions.name: Zamba-Style Attention Every n=6 SSM Blocks
predictions.claim: For Mamba-Transformer hybrids, inserting shared attention every n=6 Mamba blocks is locally optimal
predictions.falsification_criteria: Interval=4 or 8 achieves lower perplexity than interval=6

predictions.name: MAE Masking Ratio 75% = (n/phi)/tau Optimality
predictions.claim: Masked Autoencoder with 75% = 3/4 = (n/phi)/tau masking ratio is optimal for ImageNet pre-training
predictions.falsification_criteria: 60% or 80% masking achieves higher fine-tuning accuracy than 75%

predictions.name: DeepSeek-V3 Full Reproduction 14/15 EXACT
predictions.claim: Reproducing DeepSeek-V3 architecture exactly achieves better loss-per-FLOP than any non-n=6 architecture with same parameter count
predictions.falsification_criteria: Round-number config achieves lower loss per FLOP

predictions.name: GQA KV Head Count Optimum in {tau=4, sigma-tau=8}
predictions.claim: For 7B-scale models, GQA with h_kv=8 is best quality-per-memory. For MoE at 10B+, h_kv=4 is optimal.
predictions.falsification_criteria: h_kv=2 or h_kv=16 Pareto-dominates both h_kv=4 and h_kv=8

predictions.name: GNSS Constellation Size = J2=24 Universal
predictions.claim: All four GNSS constellations converge on ~24 operational satellites: GPS=24, Galileo=24, BeiDou=24(MEO), GLONASS=24
predictions.falsification_criteria: Next GNSS system deploys a non-24 base constellation

predictions.name: JWST Mirror Segments = 3n=18
predictions.claim: 18 hexagonal segments = n/phi=3 rings of n=6 segments. Future telescopes will use segment counts from {6,12,18,24,36}.
predictions.falsification_criteria: HWO uses a segment count not divisible by n=6

predictions.name: Autonomous Driving Compute Converges on sigma^2=144 TOPS
predictions.claim: Level 4/5 AV compute requirements converge on sigma^2=144 TOPS as minimum threshold
predictions.cost_estimate: Monitor Tesla FSD HW5, NVIDIA Drive Thor specs
predictions.falsification_criteria: Industry converges on threshold clearly not near {144, 256, 288} TOPS

predictions.name: Self-Driving tau=4 Subsystem Architecture
predictions.claim: Autonomous driving maintains exactly tau=4 core subsystems: Perception, Planning, Control, Localization
predictions.falsification_criteria: >=3 major AV companies converge on 5 or 6 core subsystems

predictions.name: Next ISA Opcode Width Remains n=6 Bits
predictions.claim: RISC-V extensions and future ISAs will keep effective opcode width at n=6 bits (2^6=64 base instructions)
predictions.falsification_criteria: A major new ISA uses 5-bit or 8-bit primary opcode fields

predictions.name: Page Table Depth Stays at tau=4 Levels
predictions.claim: Linux kernel default will remain CONFIG_PGTABLE_LEVELS=4=tau through 2030
predictions.falsification_criteria: Fedora/Ubuntu switch to 5-level page tables as default before 2030

predictions.name: Alcubierre Bubble Wall Thickness Ratio 1/sigma
predictions.claim: Stable warp bubble wall thickness/radius ratio minimizes negative energy density at 1/sigma = 1/12
predictions.falsification_criteria: Simulated optimal ratio deviates significantly from 1/12

predictions.name: Calabi-Yau Hodge Numbers n/phi-fold Preference
predictions.claim: CY manifolds consistent with Standard Model 3 generations have h^{1,1} concentrated at divisors of n/phi=3
predictions.falsification_criteria: No concentration at divisors of 3 in the CY catalog

predictions.name: tau=4 Cycle Warp Propulsion COP=2
predictions.claim: 4-phase (charge-boost-cruise-decelerate) cycle performance coefficient converges to sigma/n=2
predictions.falsification_criteria: Simulated COP significantly != 2

predictions.name: Virus Capsid T=3 Icosahedral Bias
predictions.claim: Most-frequent animal virus capsid triangulation number T = n/phi = 3, comprising >=50% of all capsids
predictions.falsification_criteria: T=3 is not the mode or is <30% of capsids

predictions.name: Insect 6-Leg Developmental Universality
predictions.claim: All adult insects (1M+ species) have exactly n=6 legs, with embryonic T1/T2/T3 segments each producing 1 pair
predictions.falsification_criteria: Known adult insect species with leg count != 6

predictions.name: Therapeutic Nanobot 6DOF Manipulation Precision
predictions.claim: SE(3) = n=6 DOF nanobot target reach rate saturates at 6 DOF (log-sigmoid, inflection=6)
predictions.falsification_criteria: Reach rate does not saturate at DOF=6

predictions.name: Nanobot Mk.III Swarm sigma=12 Consensus Threshold
predictions.claim: Distributed nanobot swarm Byzantine tolerance converges at node count >= 12 combined with 2/3 threshold
predictions.falsification_criteria: Consensus equally good at n=9 or n=15

predictions.name: Nanobot tau=4 Operational Cycle
predictions.claim: Inject-Patrol-Act-Eject 4-phase cycle matches blood half-life (T_cycle ~ tau=4 hours)
predictions.falsification_criteria: Optimal cycle != 4 phases

predictions.name: Consciousness Chip Cortical 6-Layer Direct Mapping
predictions.claim: ANIMA-6 chip with cache hierarchy = n=6 layers maximizes SNN simulation energy efficiency (pJ/spike)
predictions.falsification_criteria: Hierarchy=5 or 7 achieves lower pJ/spike than 6

predictions.name: Z2 Topological ECC J2=24 GB Savings
predictions.claim: Z2 topological ECC saves exactly J2=24 GB overhead vs SECDED on 288GB HBM
predictions.falsification_criteria: Savings significantly != 24 GB

predictions.name: Bott Periodicity Active Channels sopfr=5
predictions.claim: Of KO theory's 8-periodic cycle, exactly sopfr(6)=5 channels are nontrivial topological, saturation ~1-1/e=0.632
predictions.falsification_criteria: Active channels != 5 in Bott periodic table

predictions.name: Miller Cognitive Channel tau+/-mu = 4+/-1
predictions.claim: Human working memory optimal chunk count is 4 with SD 1, matching ANIMA-6 CLR registers
predictions.falsification_criteria: Optimal chunk count is 5 or 7 instead of 4

predictions.name: Grid Cell Hexagonal Array n=6
predictions.claim: Entorhinal grid cell firing field neighbor ratio follows hexagonal arrangement (n=6 neighbors) to +/-5%
predictions.cost_estimate: Moser lab public dataset reanalysis, 3 days
predictions.falsification_criteria: Grid cells show non-hexagonal arrangement

predictions.name: Virus RNA 6-Nucleotide Frame
predictions.claim: +ssRNA virus (Coronaviridae etc.) ORF frameshift distance statistics show peaks at multiples of 6
predictions.cost_estimate: NCBI RefSeq coronavirus genome scan, 1 day
predictions.falsification_criteria: No significant peak at multiples of 6

predictions.name: Insect Scale Wing Hexagonal Lattice
predictions.claim: Butterfly/moth wing scale microribs converge to hexagonal lattice spacing within +/-3% (structural color determinant)
predictions.falsification_criteria: Microrib arrangement is not hexagonal

predictions.name: Agricultural Yield sigma=12x Enhancement
predictions.claim: C6H12O6 photosynthesis optimization + n=6 phase cultivation cycle achieves sigma=12x yield improvement
predictions.falsification_criteria: Yield increase <6x vs control

predictions.name: Traffic Signal tau=4 Optimization
predictions.claim: tau=4 phase signal (red-left-straight-pedestrian) reduces average wait time 75% vs multi-phase
predictions.falsification_criteria: tau=4 phases no better than tau=5+ phases in wait time

predictions.name: Home Power phi=2 Savings via Smart Grid
predictions.claim: Smart meter n=6 parameter monitoring + AI peak distribution achieves phi=2x (50%) household power savings
predictions.falsification_criteria: Savings <25%

predictions.name: Water Membrane Lifetime sopfr=5 Year Convergence
predictions.claim: n=6 optimized membrane design (hexagonal pore + sigma-phi=10 water criteria) converges to sopfr=5 year replacement cycle
predictions.cost_estimate: Accelerated aging test (ASTM D3045) + field monitoring
predictions.falsification_criteria: Lifetime <3 years or >7 years (sopfr=5 +/-40% deviation)

predictions.name: Typhoon Energy phi=2 Reduction (Ocean Cooling Array)
predictions.claim: sigma^2=144 km^2 ocean cooling array deployment reduces typhoon energy by phi=2x (50%), lowering SST by n=6 degrees C
predictions.cost_estimate: WRF numerical weather simulation + pilot deployment
predictions.falsification_criteria: Energy reduction <20%

predictions.name: Vaccine Development sigma=12x Acceleration
predictions.claim: mRNA platform + sigma=12 parallel optimization + tau=4 adjuvant steps achieves 6 month -> 2 week development. Immune duration = sigma*n/phi = 36 months.
predictions.cost_estimate: WHO collaboration, Phase 1 entry speed measurement
predictions.falsification_criteria: Development period >1 month (sigma=6x acceleration or less)

predictions.name: Recycling Rate 99.7% via J2=24 Category Optimization
predictions.claim: AI classification into J2(6)=24 categories + sigma*phi=24 combinatorial optimization achieves 99.7% recycling rate (vs ~60% current)
predictions.cost_estimate: Pilot recycling center, 6 months operation data
predictions.falsification_criteria: Recycling rate <90%

predictions.name: Lithium Recovery Rate 99.2% via tau=4 Stage Process
predictions.claim: tau=4 stage restoration process (disassemble-separate-purify-resynthesize) achieves 99.2% lithium recovery. Energy savings sigma-phi=10x vs mining.
predictions.falsification_criteria: Recovery rate <95%
